welcomePage.heading: The Chatbot
welcomePage.subtitle: WhatsApp · Google Sheets · AI
welcomePage.description: is a versatile conversational agent designed to help you organize your life directly from WhatsApp.

features.title: Financial Control
features.description: Track expenses and cash flow automatically in Google Sheets.

features.title: Secure Integration
features.description: Your data is protected with Google Authentication.

features.title: Always Available
features.description: Interact naturally at any time, anywhere.

welcomePage.footerPrompt: Send a message to get started

thankYouPage.heading: Thank you!
thankYouPage.subtitle: Account connected successfully
thankYouPage.body: Thank you for trusting us. Your Google account has been successfully authenticated and you are ready to explore all features.
thankYouPage.footerPrompt: You can now safely close this window

alreadySignedInPage.heading: Already connected!
alreadySignedInPage.subtitle: Your Google session is active
alreadySignedInPage.body: We detected an existing authentication for your Google account. Your session has been automatically updated and you are ready to continue.
alreadySignedInPage.footerPrompt: You can now safely close this window

notFoundPage.subtitle: Page not found
notFoundPage.body: The requested path does not exist in this terminal session.

chatPage.errorLoading: Failed to load chat. Please try again.
chatPage.errorSending: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chatPage.errorMicrophone: Could not access microphone. Check permissions.
chatPage.emptyState: Send a message to start chatting

todoPage.heading: Terminal Todos
todoPage.subtitle: Review tasks captured from chat and keep your queue moving.
todoPage.deleteConfirmation: Delete this todo? This action cannot be undone.
todoPage.emptyState: No todos match this terminal query.
todoPage.errorLoading: Failed to load todos. Please try again.
todoPage.errorSaving: Failed to save todo. Please try again.
todoPage.errorDeleting: Failed to delete todo. Please try again.

billsPage.heading: Monthly Bills
billsPage.subtitle: A fresh checklist for every month. No bill left behind.
billsPage.monthHistoryHint: Changes carry forward until a later month overrides them.
billsPage.emptyHint: Add rent, utilities, subscriptions, and anything else that returns every month.
billsPage.optionalHint: Amount and due day are optional. Useful for bills that like surprises.
billsPage.deleteConfirmation: Archive this bill? Previous payment records will be preserved.
billsPage.errorLoading: Failed to load monthly bills. Please try again.
billsPage.errorSaving: Failed to save the monthly bill. Please try again.
billsPage.errorDeleting: Failed to archive the monthly bill. Please try again.

chatLoginPage.heading: Sign in to chat
chatLoginPage.subtitle: Use your Google account to continue
chatLoginPage.body: Sign in with the same Google account already registered in The Chatbot app. If your account is eligible, you will be redirected straight into the web chat.
chatLoginPage.footerPrompt: Authenticate with Google to open your chat session

chatNotRegisteredPage.heading: Not Registered
chatNotRegisteredPage.subtitle: Account not found
chatNotRegisteredPage.body: You need to register via WhatsApp first before using the web chat. Send a message to our WhatsApp bot to get started.
